ui.vault.title: Vaults
ui.vault.create.failed.title: Couldn't create vault
ui.vault.switch.confirm.title: Switch vault?
ui.vault.switch.confirm.message: Mindstream Notes will restart to open “{name}”.
ui.vault.switch.devRestart.title: Vault switched
ui.vault.switch.devRestart.message: Now using “{name}”. Restart the app to load it — auto-restart is disabled while running the dev server.
ui.vault.switch.failed.title: Couldn't switch vault
ui.vault.rename.failed.title: Couldn't rename vault
ui.vault.delete.confirm.title: Delete vault?
ui.vault.delete.confirm.message: Permanently delete “{name}” and all of its notes, attachments and settings? This cannot be undone.
ui.vault.delete.failed.title: Couldn't delete vault
ui.title: Settings
ui.account.managedUnavailable: Not available yet — pick "Self-hosted" to use your own server.
ui.data.openFolder.failed.title: Couldn't open the data folder
ui.data.emptyTrash.confirm.title: Empty trash
ui.data.emptyTrash.confirm.message: {notes} note(s) and {folders} folder(s) will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
ui.data.emptyTrash.alreadyEmpty.title: Trash is empty
ui.data.emptyTrash.alreadyEmpty.message: There's nothing to remove right now.
ui.data.emptyTrash.failed.title: Couldn't empty trash
ui.data.backupNow.success.title: Backup saved
ui.data.backupNow.success.message: Backed up {notes} note(s) and {folders} folder(s) to {destination}.
ui.data.backupNow.failed.title: Couldn't create backup
ui.data.backupNow.chip.account.label: Account
ui.data.result.chip.attachments.label: Attachments
ui.data.import.title: Import Mindstream Notes backup
ui.data.import.notice.sameAccount: The backup matches your current account — sync metadata will be preserved on restore.
ui.data.import.notice.differentAccount: The backup is from a different account or has no account info. On restore, sync metadata will be dropped so your data re-syncs from scratch.
ui.data.import.merge.success.title: Merge complete
ui.data.import.merge.success.message: Added {notes} note(s), {folders} folder(s), and {assets} attachment(s). {orphaned} note(s) lost their original folder and landed at the root.
ui.data.import.restore.confirm.title: Replace everything?
ui.data.import.restore.confirm.sameAccount: Your current vault will be replaced with the backup. Your existing data is saved as a timestamped pre-restore copy in the data folder so you can recover it manually.
ui.data.import.restore.confirm.differentAcc: Your current vault will be replaced with the backup. Sync metadata will be dropped so the restored data uploads to your current account from scratch. Your existing data is saved as a timestamped pre-restore copy in the data folder.
ui.data.import.restart.title: Restart to finish restore
ui.data.import.restart.message: Mindstream Notes will close and reopen so the backup can be swapped in cleanly. Any unsaved changes are already on disk.
ui.data.import.result.restoreReady.preserve: Backup staged. Restart Mindstream Notes to swap it in cleanly; your current data will be kept as a timestamped pre-restore copy.
ui.data.import.result.restoreReady.sanitize: Backup staged. Restart Mindstream Notes to swap it in cleanly; sync metadata will be reset and your current data will be kept as a timestamped pre-restore copy.
ui.data.import.restore.chip.sync.label: Sync
ui.data.import.failed.title: Couldn't import backup
ui.data.exportVault.success.title: Notes exported
ui.data.exportVault.failed.title: Couldn't export notes
ui.sort.label: Sort
ui.breadcrumb.label: Folder path
ui.fileTree.title: Explorer
ui.fileTree.emptyRoot: No notes yet. Right-click here to create one.
ui.noteSidebar.title: Details
ui.history.title: History
ui.history.empty: No earlier versions yet. Edits are saved automatically as you work.
ui.history.restoreUnavailable: Open the note to restore a version.
ui.history.restoreConfirmBody: This replaces the note's current content with this version. You can undo it by restoring the snapshot taken just before.
ui.history.diff.identical: No differences from the current note.
ui.history.diffFailed: Couldn't render the visual diff for this version.
ui.history.modal.title: Note history
ui.tags.label: Tags
ui.tags.emptyType: Type a tag and press Enter.
ui.search.notes.label: Search notes
ui.search.empty: Type to search across every note's title, body, and tags.
ui.search.hint: ↑↓ to navigate · ↵ to open · Esc to close
ui.notifications.title: Notifications
ui.notifications.update.title: Update available
ui.notifications.update.message: Mindstream Notes {to} is available. You're on {from}.
ui.hotkeys.editChip.tooltip: Click to record a new shortcut
ui.hotkeys.conflict.tooltip: This shortcut is already assigned. Choose a different shortcut or clear the other command first.
ui.hotkeys.osConflict.label: May be captured by
ui.hotkeys.osConflict.tooltip: Your operating system usually captures this shortcut before the app can see it. You can still save it, but it may not fire.
ui.hotkeys.macAltHint.label: Tip: hold ⌘ as well — on macOS, Option alone composes special characters
ui.hotkeys.macAltHint.tooltip: macOS composes special characters when Option (Alt) is held alone (Option+A → å). Adding Cmd captures the plain key.
ui.hotkeys.feedback.invalid: That key can't be used as a shortcut. Add a modifier such as Ctrl, Alt, or Shift.
ui.hotkeys.feedback.conflict: That shortcut is already used by {command}.
ui.hotkeys.feedback.savedWithOsWarning: Shortcut saved, but your operating system may capture it before the app sees it.
ui.hotkeys.feedback.globalUnsupported: That key can't be used as a global shortcut — pick a key from A–Z, 0–9, the function keys, or the standard US punctuation row.
ui.hotkeys.resetAll.label: Reset all
ui.hotkeys.resetAll.tooltip: Restore every shortcut to its default
ui.hotkeys.resetAll.title: Reset all shortcuts?
ui.hotkeys.resetAll.message: Every customised keyboard shortcut will return to its default. This cannot be undone.
ui.hotkeys.search.label: Search keyboard shortcuts
ui.hotkeys.help.title: Keyboard shortcuts
ui.editor.toolbar.label: Formatting
ui.editor.trash.banner: This note is in the trash and is read-only. Restore it to edit.
ui.editor.wikilink.menu.label: Link to note
ui.editor.wikilink.menu.empty: No notes match — keep typing to insert a new link
ui.editor.unknownKind.title: Can't open this note
ui.editor.unknownKind.message: This note was created with an editor type this version of the app doesn't support. Update to the latest version to open it. The note's content is safe — it hasn't been changed.
ui.editor.ink.desktopNativeWindowTitle: Handwritten note opened in a native window
ui.editor.ink.desktopNativeWindowMessage: Draw in the separate ink window while the desktop bridge is being embedded into the editor panel.
ui.ink.toolbar.label: Ink controls
ui.ink.toolbar.clearConfirm.title: Clear handwritten note?
ui.ink.toolbar.clearConfirm.message: This removes every stroke from this handwritten note. You can undo it while the note stays open.
ui.pdf.page.caption: Page {page}/{total}
ui.pdf.export.label: Download annotated PDF
ui.pdf.toolbar.label: PDF controls
ui.pdf.navigator.label: Pages and outline
ui.pdf.annotation.label: Annotation actions
ui.pdf.selection.label: Selection actions
ui.pdf.comments.label: PDF comments
ui.pdf.comments.title: Comments ({count})
ui.updater.checkFailed.title: Couldn't check for updates
ui.updater.checkFailed.message: We weren't able to reach the update server. Check your internet connection and try again.
ui.updater.upToDate.title: You're up to date
ui.updater.upToDate.message: Mindstream Notes {version} is the latest version.
ui.updater.available.title: Update available
ui.updater.available.message: Version {to} is available (you're on {from}). If you continue, the update will download now and install immediately. The program will restart automatically when ready.
ui.updater.installFailed.title: Update failed
ui.updater.installFailed.message: The update couldn't be installed. The current version is still running — you can try again later.
ui.updater.ready.title: Update ready
ui.updater.ready.message: Mindstream Notes will restart to finish updating. Any unsaved changes are already on disk.
ui.updater.progress.title: Updating Mindstream Notes
ui.updater.unsupportedLinux.title: In-app update not available
ui.updater.unsupportedLinux.message: Mindstream Notes was installed from a system package (rpm / deb), which can only be updated through your distribution. Download the latest version from https://github.com/jannikgohr/mindstream-notes/releases/latest and reinstall, or use the AppImage build for in-app updates.

account.label: Account & Sync
account.description: Connect to a managed or self-hosted server, manage devices and sync.

hotkeys.label: Hotkeys
hotkeys.description: Customise keyboard shortcuts for actions across the app and editors.

general.closeToTray.label: Close to system tray
general.closeToTray.description: Hide the main window instead of quitting when you close it.

general.startInTray.label: Start in system tray
general.startInTray.description: When launched by your system at login, start hidden in the tray instead of opening the window.

editor.desktopToolbar.label: Show formatting toolbar
editor.desktopToolbar.description: Adds an icon toolbar above each note for quick formatting.

editor.wikilinkOpenOnClick.label: Open wikilinks with left click
editor.wikilinkOpenOnClick.description: Open note links with a normal click. Turn this off to place the caret inside note links and use Ctrl/Cmd-click to open them.

editor.freeform.penMode.label: Stylus / pen mode
editor.freeform.penMode.description: When on, only stylus input draws — finger touches pan and zoom. Helps prevent stray marks from your palm on tablets.

editor.ink.fingerDrawing.label: Draw with fingers
editor.ink.fingerDrawing.description: Allow finger or touch input to draw instead of only panning and zooming.

editor.ink.pageTheme.label: Ink page theme
editor.ink.pageTheme.description: Choose whether handwritten pages stay light, dark, or follow the app theme.

editor.ink.pageBackgroundColor.label: Ink page background color
editor.ink.pageBackgroundColor.description: Colour of the page background pattern. Applied at a low opacity so it stays subtle.

hotkeys.globalShortcuts.label: Enable global shortcuts
hotkeys.globalShortcuts.description: Let application-level shortcuts fire while Mindstream Notes is in the background. Editor formatting shortcuts stay in-app only.

data.historyRetentionDays.label: Keep edit history for
data.historyRetentionDays.description: How long automatically-saved note versions are kept on this device. History is local and never synced.

data.historyIdleSeconds.label: Snapshot after a pause
data.historyIdleSeconds.description: How long after you stop typing a history version is saved.

data.historyTokenThreshold.label: Snapshot after this many changes
data.historyTokenThreshold.description: Save a version once this many visible characters change since the last one, so long editing sessions without a pause still get versions.

data.restoreBackup.label: Restore from backup
data.restoreBackup.description: Open a Mindstream Notes backup zip and either replace your current vault or merge missing items in.

data.importNotes.label: Import notes
data.importNotes.description: Import notes from external sources like Markdown files or Obsidian vaults. Coming soon.

about.scanForUpdates.label: Scan for updates
about.scanForUpdates.description: Check for a new Mindstream Notes version when the desktop app starts and show it as a notification.
